chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.02 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case (Priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.79/2021 25.03.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the respondent It is jointly stated that the questions in this reference application have been decided against the department vide judgment dated 02.11.2020 in SCRA 340 of 2018 and other connected matters. Copy whereof has been placed on record. Learned counsel states that the Division Bench judgment is binding on this court, therefore, this court may be pleased to answer the questions against the department and in favour of the respondent and dismiss the reference application in mutatis mutandis application of the judgment as aforesaid, subject to right of appeal to the applicant. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
